title: Malicious Code Execution Detected
description: Detects malicious code execution patterns including base64 encoded commands and reverse shells.
author: SOC Team
aql: LOGSOURCENAME(logsourceid) ILIKE '%LinuxServer%' AND (payload ILIKE '%base64%' OR payload ILIKE '%/dev/tcp%' OR payload ILIKE '%mkfifo%' OR payload ILIKE '%0>&1%')
